texto: I really thought to myself, 'If I'm going to do anything in this world, I am going to be the best I can be.' I have a tennis coach that has taken me as far as my body can go. I hired a private skiing coach during my birthday week. I have a private yoga instructor. I just don't understand why you wouldn't give yourself every advantage.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Pincus sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I really thought to myself, 'If I'm going to do anything in this world, I am going to be the best…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, myself em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como aniversario e inspiracao.
